title: Youtube Poop: The Diarrhea of Haruhi Suzumiya
description:
A gift for Captpan6.. I guess. well, the reason I actually touched this source is because Pan made the super-cool airman vide for me. Originally this was going to be like my normal stuff, but I decided to effort all over it and see how you blokes would like it. If you like it, I'll make more like this, if you don't I won't (hahahaha... rhyme) I don't care either way. I have fun making these no matter what so shoot. I just wanted to experiment with a new style please don't kill me.
